resources.string: Sut
Let leh rawh
Lehpek
I pattern tichiang rawh
Lehpek
Unlock pattern rin rawh
Tella unlock turin pattern rin rawh
I unlock pattern thar
Pattern save a ni
Dot paruk tal thlunzawmin i pattern rin rawh
I zawh hunah i kutzungṭang la sawn rawh
Paih fai
Pattern a dik lo, khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Pattern ṭan a ni
Pattern paih fai a ni
Cell belh a ni
Cell %1$d belh a ni
Pattern zawh a ni
Pattern rinna hmun.
Tella unlock turin i pattern rin rawh
Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh. I pattern a inmil lo.
I PIN chhu lut rawh
Tella unlock turin i PIN chhu lut rawh
Digit 6 tal hmang rawh. I piancham ang chi, mi rin theih mai tur awlsam hmang suh.
I PIN tichiang rawh
Chian lehzual nan, khawngaihin i PIN vawikhat dang chhu lut leh rawh.
Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh. I PIN a inmil lo.
PIN a dik lo, khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
I password chhu lut rawh
Character 6 tal hmang la, “password” ang chi mi rin awlsam tur hmang suh. I password a sei poh leh a him a ni mai.
Khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh. I password a inmil lo.
I inpeih ta!
Settings-ah i lock thlangin Tella hi i duh danin i siamrem thei reng a nia.
Tella-ah lut rawh
Password a dik lo, khawngaihin ti nawn leh rawh
Tella unlock turin i password chhu lut rawh
I password tichiang rawh
Chian lehzual nan, khawngaihin i password vawikhat dang chhu lut leh rawh.
I lock thlak turin i password hman lai chhu lut rawh
I lock thlak turin i pattern hman lai rin rawh
I lock thlak turin i PIN hman lai chhu lut rawh
I inthup dan thlak turin i password hman lai chhu lut rawh
I inthup dan thlak turin i pattern hman lai rin rawh
I inthup dan thlak turin i PIN hman lai chhu lut rawh
Lock
I lock thlak a ni tawh!
